subject: Fw: Andrew Farkas
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> 
Sent: Sunday, November 19, 2006 6:21 PM
Subject: Re: Andrew Farkas
 


I'm only interested in AMerican Yacht Harbor st thomas.


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, November 18, 2006 10:55:11 PM
Subject: Andrew Farkas


There is $10mm left from this round. It was to have gone to lehman, but dick fuld was counseled, since the firm was a material investor, that he and the execs could not invest directly. This piece would go to abu dhabi, but you can have it if you want. You were here first and you have been unfailingly supportive. Just let me know. 
--------------------------
Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld


-----Original Message-----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: Farkas, Andrew 
Sent: Sat Nov 18 22:41:54 2006
Subject: Re: From Jeffrey Epstein

IF I can I'll take a bigger piece .




On 11/17/06, Farkas, Andrew <afarkas@islecap.com > wrote:

       You are in it. You are in every single one of them. You should move your office to yacht haven. It's the nicest office space in the usvi.
       --------------------------
       Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld 


       -----Original Message-----
       From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
       To: Farkas, Andrew
       Sent: Fri Nov 17 18:09:27 2006 
       Subject: Re: From Jeffrey Epstein

       I would like to be on that,,as I have both my office and boats there




       On 11/17/06, Farkas, Andrew < afarkas@islecap.com <mailto:afarkas@islecap.com> > wrote:

              No problem. I have been in the bahamas and atlanta since I last spoke to you and I am about to take off for nyc. I will head back to the bahamas on 11/21. On 11/22 or 11/24 I am flying to St. Thomas for one day and I am bringing a bunch of bahmian ministers to see the project. Just fyi we are now in contract to buy american yacht harbor in St. Thomas where you keep your tenders. 
              --------------------------
              Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld


              -----Original Message-----
              From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com <mailto:cecilia.steen@gmail.com> >
              To: Farkas, Andrew
              Sent: Fri Nov 17 16:40:50 2006
              Subject: From Jeffrey Epstein 

              Sorry I missed you today, I was at a building dept meeting.
              --------------------------------------------------------
